heading: Query Across Multiple Collections
body:
When your search must span multiple collections, you can use the
following methods to search across them:

- To join collections and search across them, use the [$lookup](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/lookup) stage
  with [$search](pipe.$search).

- To combine search results from multiple collections, use the [$unionWith](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/unionWith) stage.

- To consolidate multiple collections so you can index and search them together,
  create a [materialized view](manual/core/materialized-views).

To get started, see [search multiple collections](fts-cross-collection-tutorials).
